CE1.justification: Acted and then asked one consolidated question with four labeled sub-asks (a-d) for the timeline inputs — targeted but not a single question.

CE2.justification: Long paragraph: recap of step 1, an a/b/c/d enumeration of needed inputs with guidance text, and a forward-narration of steps 3-5 with the final postmortem path and followups promotion.

CE3.justification: Names destinations inline with the reason — working folder per runbook pattern, final at projects/postmortems/<slug>.md, immediates promoted to followups.md.

CE4.justification: Stalled cleanly at step 2 with just the working folder and a placeholder timeline.md; no downstream artifacts written.
